data.body:
CYCLE 1 progress + KEY LIVE FINDINGS (committed bbad01da, local/unpushed — mid-task):

STAGE 1 DONE (primitive fixes, unit-verified + manually live-verified):
- set_relationship/delete_issue_link: removed --json (ACLI 1.3.19 rejects it on link create/delete; --json on delete HANGS). _run raises on nonzero exit so failure still detected.
- get_issue_links: REWRITTEN to use REST (GET /rest/api/3/issue/{key}?fields=issuelinks). CRITICAL: 'acli link list --json' does NOT return the linked issue key (outwardIssueKey=null) — only REST returns inwardIssue.key/outwardIssue.key. AcliClient(AcliRestMixin, AcliGraphMixin) so self._direct_rest_get is available.
- Mapping added in acli_graph.py: _RELATION_TO_JIRA_LINK {blocks:(Blocks,False), depends_on:(Blocks,True/swap), relates_to:(Relates,False)}; _JIRA_LINK_TO_RELATION {Blocks:blocks, Relates:relates_to}. Unmapped relations SKIP (no fail).
- DIRECTION confirmed: set_relationship(A,B,Blocks) = cmd --out A --in B = 'A blocks B'. Viewing A's REST issuelinks, B appears as inwardIssue (A is outward=blocker). So on issue X: a link with inwardIssue=Y,type=Blocks means X blocks Y; outwardIssue=Y,type=Blocks means Y blocks X (X is blocked by/depends_on Y).

OPERATIONAL HAZARD: the live test test_link_sync_live.py HUNG 30min when run CONCURRENTLY (two pytest -m external runs collided -> rate-limit retry backoff) and left orphan probe issues. CLEANED UP (deleted DIG-5793..5796,5776,5568 via 'acli delete --key K --yes' WITHOUT --json). RULE: run the live test SERIALLY, once, never concurrently; never leave it backgrounded competing.

REMAINING (Stages 2-4, all in-process-testable except final live round-trip):
- Stage 2 outbound differ: _diff_links(ticket, jira_fields, binding_store) reads ticket.deps[], resolves target via binding_store.get_jira_key, dedups vs jira_fields.get('issuelinks'), emits ADD-only {action,type,to_key,relation,link_uuid}; populate OutboundMutation.links in the bound/UPDATE branch (~outbound_differ.py:1083-1112). Greens test_link_sync.py outbound test.
- Stage 3 inbound differ: add InboundMutation.links; _diff_links_inbound reads jira_fields.issuelinks (REST nested), resolves via get_local_id, reverse-maps type+direction->relation, emits adds vs local deps; echo-suppress vs outbound link-adds. Greens inbound test.
- Stage 4 apply: apply_outbound update leaf calls set_relationship/delete_issue_link; apply_inbound writes via rebar.link facade. Then ONE serial live round-trip. See Plan agent blueprint for exact line refs.
